zh.lifeSummary: 當Beata Johansdatter von Thienen於1360年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維-福倫斯包格史萊斯維時，她的父親Johan von Theinen18歲，母親Anna Nicolausdatter Limbek15歲。她於1383年與Erik Segebodsen Krummedige結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1407年在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beata Johansdatter von Thienen于1360年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維-福倫斯包格史萊斯維时，她的父亲Johan von Theinen18岁，母亲Anna Nicolausdatter Limbek15岁。她于1383年与Erik Segebodsen Krummedige结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1407年在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thienen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Thiel  .

variants.name: Thelen
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Thietilo. Thelen is a variant of Thielen .

Swedish (Thelén): ornamental or habitational name from the element Thel- of uncertain meaning (see Thelander ) + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Thelin .

variants.name: Thiel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Egon, Franz, Reinhard, Wolfgang, Angelika, Arno, Bernhard.

North German, Dutch, and Flemish: from a shortened form of the personal name Thietilo, an early medieval pet form of Dietrich (German), Diederik (Dutch), or from some other compound name with the same first element.
Germanized form of Sorbian, Polish, and Czech   Tyl  , a name which is (at least in part) of the same German origin as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Beata
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Late Latin feminine form of Beatus ‘blessed’. The name was borne by an early Christian saint martyred in North Africa. Beata is widely used among Roman Catholics in Germany, Poland, and elsewhere; it is less common in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Beata Johansdatter von Thienen was born in 1360, in Schleswig, Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, her father, Johan von Theinen, was 18 and her mother, Anna Nicolausdatter Limbek, was 15. She married Erik Segebodsen Krummedige in 1383. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1407, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

Elle a épousé Erik Segebodsen Krummedige en 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1407, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ko.Rundhof,Flensborg,Slesvig-Holstein,Pruss: 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 플렌스버그 스그루스 스탠게이c크 런드호프
ko.lifeSummary: Beata Johansdatter von Thienen(이)가 1360년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그-플렌스버그 슐레스위그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johan von Theinen(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Nicolausdatter Limbek(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1383년 Erik Segebodsen Krummedige(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beata Johansdatter von Thienen родилась в 1360 г. в местности щлесвиг, крис щлесвиг-фленсбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, её отцу по имени Johan von Theinen было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Nicolausdatter Limbek, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Erik Segebodsen Krummedige в 1383 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1407 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
